steps.title: Match the corresponding angles
steps.content: The similarity statement says $R$ corresponds to $U$ and $S$ corresponds to $V$. Therefore, angle $S$ and angle $V$ are corresponding angles.

steps.title: Use similarity
steps.content: Corresponding angles in similar triangles are congruent. Since angle $S$ measures $58^\circ$, angle $V$ also measures $58^\circ$. The answer is B.
